name: Hershey's 50% Reduced Fat Chocolate Brownies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Lower fat margarine (40% oil, melted and divided)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 13x9-inch baking pan with vegetable oil spray.
3. In a large bowl, stir together cocoa and baking soda.
4. Stir in 1/3 cup melted margarine.
5. Add boiling water; stir until the mixture thickens.
6. Stir in sugar, egg whites, vanilla, and the remaining 1/3 cup melted margarine until smooth.
7. Add flour and salt; blend completely.
8. Stir in baking chips; pour into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes or until brownies begin to pull away from sides of pan.
10. Cool completely in pan on a wire rack.
11. Cut into squares (36 brownies).
